headline: Brazil chase a first World Cup since 2002 — and turned to a foreigner to do it
summary: Five-time winners Brazil arrive at WC 2026 chasing their first title since 2002, and for the first time handed the national team to a foreign coach: Carlo Ancelotti. Vinícius Júnior leads a new generation (Endrick, Matheus Cunha) while 34-year-old Neymar was included as a veteran presence. More than two decades without the trophy hangs over the most successful nation in World Cup history.
angles: 24 years without a World Cup for the 5-time champions — is Brazil still a giant?
A foreign coach for Brazil — genius move or betrayal of tradition?
Is this Vinícius Jr's team now, not Neymar's?
Can Ancelotti finally translate club greatness to international glory?
